prompt_inputs.goal: Lose 8kg while maintaining muscle and improving cardiovascular fitness within 12 weeks with minimal time commitment

solution_criteria: Workout plan includes 3-4 sessions per week of 30-45 minutes each, emphasizing compound exercises and high-intensity intervals suitable for busy schedules
Diet plan provides simple, grocery-delivery-friendly meals requiring minimal prep time with clear caloric targets for weight loss
Both workout and diet recommendations are realistic and actionable for someone working 60+ hours per week
task_description: Create a solid workout and diet plan for Working Professional
scenario: Testing with a busy professional working 60+ hours per week with limited time for meal prep and gym access, requiring quick, efficient workouts and simple meal plans using grocery delivery services
